calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-06-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis,
CSR: B. Fields, #7235

ANDRES SANCHEZ, Esq. for Plaintiff: YIN HOWAN.
Plaintiff's Witness DARIO LEON FUENTES was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant VERA SVECHINA.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 525 STOCKTON ST., #403, SF, CA.
The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-06-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2011 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discvoery From Deft And Request For Monetray Sanctions
Off Calendar May-17-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANDRES SANCHEZ OF MC HALL & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 512-9865 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF YIN HOWAN'S Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery From Defendant And Request For Monetary Sanctions is Granted, no opposition was filed. Responses to be provided by noon of May 23, 2011. Sanctions of $865.00 is awarded and to be paid from notice of entry of order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported = (301/PJB)
